name: Live as the side/secret character
description:
Transmigrate into an otome game as the side/secret character.

Will you watch the plot, follow the plot or make a new plot?

Typical story ¯⁠\⁠_⁠(⁠ツ⁠)⁠_⁠/⁠¯

The protagonist, Maria (1) is a commoner girl who possessed Light magic and has earn the right to attend your prestigious school, the Magic Academy.

Rumour has it that the Demon King has return for vengeance and is now planning on taking the world all over again. The story follow our protagonist, Maria throughout her school life, learning magic and strengthening her magic in order to eliminate the Demon King to restore peace. Along the way, she will meet four love interest;

The crown prince 'Arthur Estella' (2)

The crown prince younger brother 'Julius Estella' (4)

The villainess' brother 'Austin De Luna' (6)

The student council president at Magic Academy 'Luca Mintz' (5)

Now it depends on how will Maria, the Heroine get close to them and gain their assistant in defeating the Demon King while avoiding the villainess (3)

Magic Academy uniforms: White button shirt, necktie or red bow for girls, black trousers or skirt, black sock or legging, black shoes and red blazer or sweatshirt depending on the season

______

The demon king just watching from afar with a fond smile at the chaos you created at the academy lol.

Side char;

Orion Dean

Charlotte's childhood friend who knows about Charlotte more than anyone.

Ash Ford

The Crown Prince's childhood friend and assistant, knight-to-be

Rena Aeris

Charlotte's lackey

LONG INTRO WARNING!!⚠️ ⚠️

Have fun!!(⁠≧⁠▽⁠≦⁠)
creator: Bbgirl_Estelle
